Package com.irurueta.units

Class AccelerationFormatter

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.irurueta.units.MeasureFormatter<Acceleration,​AccelerationUnit>
      • com.irurueta.units.AccelerationFormatter
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.Cloneable
    public class AccelerationFormatter
extends MeasureFormatter<Acceleration,​AccelerationUnit>
implements java.lang.Cloneable
    Formats and parses acceleration value and unit.

      • equals

        hash code.

      • getUnitSystem

        public UnitSystem getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
        Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
        Specified by:
        getUnitSystem in class MeasureFormatter<Acceleration,​AccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a measurement string representation to be checked.
        Returns:
        a unit system (either metric or imperial) or null if unit cannot be determined.

      • parse

        public Acceleration parse​(java.lang.String source)
                   throws java.text.ParseException,
                          UnknownUnitException
        Parses provided string and tries to determine acceleration value and unit.
        Specified by:
        parse in class MeasureFormatter<Acceleration,​AccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a string to be parsed.
        Returns:
        an acceleration containing a value and unit.
        Throws:
        java.text.ParseException - if provided string cannot be parsed.
        UnknownUnitException - if unit cannot be determined.

      • findUnit

        public AccelerationUnit findUnit​(java.lang.String source)
        Attempts to determine an acceleration unit within a measurement string representation.
        Specified by:
        findUnit in class MeasureFormatter<Acceleration,​AccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        source - a measurement string representation.
        Returns:
        an acceleration unit, or null if none can be determined.

      • formatAndConvert

        public java.lang.String formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value,
                                         AccelerationUnit unit,
                                         UnitSystem system)
        Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using provided unit system. If provided value is too large for provided unit, this method will convert it to a more appropriate unit using provided unit system (either metric or imperial).
        Specified by:
        formatAndConvert in class MeasureFormatter<Acceleration,​AccelerationUnit>
        Parameters:
        value - an acceleration value.
        unit - an acceleration unit.
        system - system unit to convert measurement to.
        Returns:
        a string representation of acceleration value and unit.

      • formatAndConvertMetric

        public java.lang.String formatAndConvertMetric​(java.lang.Number value,
                                               AccelerationUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using metric unit system.
        Parameters:
        value - an acceleration value.
        unit - an acceleration unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of acceleration value and unit using metric unit system.

      • formatAndConvertImperial

        public java.lang.String formatAndConvertImperial​(java.lang.Number value,
                                                 AccelerationUnit unit)
        Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using imperial unit system.
        Parameters:
        value - an acceleration value.
        unit - an acceleration unit.
        Returns:
        a string representation of acceleration value and unit using imperial unit system.

        public java.lang.String getUnitSymbol​(AccelerationUnit unit)
